stage6.name: Stage 6: Year-Weighted Constructor
stage6.description: Dirichlet-Multinomial with recency-weighted constructor priors. Trained 2015-2025.

stage8.name: Stage 8: Time-Varying Plackett-Luce
stage8.description: Time-varying driver strengths with Plackett-Luce ranking model. Trained 2015-2025. Warning: Degenerate — excluded from composite.

stage9.name: Stage 9: Bayesian State-Space
stage9.description: Random walk on driver/constructor log-strengths with Plackett-Luce observations. Trained 2015-2025. Warning: Degenerate — excluded from composite.
